summary: Homepage performance dropped further to 61 (LCP 6.5 s) — persistently well below 85 across many consecutive audits with no improvement trend; /projects and both project detail pages remain below or at threshold, and /about is still an empty placeholder with SEO under 85.

pages.visual_fingerprint: Full-page portfolio homepage with teal-accented hero ('App' heading, 'Send me a message' CTA), four content sections (pillars, case studies, skills, contact form), and a dark contact footer — all sections visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

visual_findings: Page still contains only the placeholder text 'This is an about page' on a near-blank dark canvas — no real content, nav, or footer present on either desktop or mobile.
pages.visual_fingerprint: Nearly blank dark page with only the stub text 'This is an about page' in the upper-left corner and no other UI elements visible on desktop or mobile.

Fully styled projects index page with 'My Projects' heading, five project cards (Clinical Note Structurer, Screenshot → PrimeVue, Lease Diff Explainer, Paperwork → Calendar, Dependency Upgrade Planner) in a 2-column desktop grid with the fifth card left-aligned, and a dark contact footer visible on both desktop and mobile.

Clinical Note Structurer detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 10/10 passing' badge, two-column visit note / structured result interactive demo, amber disclaimer banner, expandable JSON and HIPAA notes accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

Screenshot → PrimeVue detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 5/5 passing' badge, dashed-border image drop zone, three sample thumbnail cards (Login form, Analytics dashboard, Pricing page), a placeholder result panel, expandable accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 6.5 s, performance score 61, deteriorating across consecutive audits): preload the hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF at mobile-appropriate dimensions, and defer render-blocking resources above the fold — this is the single highest-impact unresolved issue on the site.
issue_title: Homepage performance at 61 (LCP 6.5 s) — persistent multi-audit regression with no improvement; /projects/screenshot-to-primevue also regressed 7 pts
issue_body:
## Homepage performance continues to deteriorate

The homepage (`/`) scored **61** on today's mobile Lighthouse audit (2026-07-11), with LCP at **6,544 ms** and TBT spiking to **204 ms**. This is a further drop of 6 points from yesterday's 67, and the score has now ranged 61–71 across many consecutive audits with zero improvement trend. The open issue from the previous cycle remains unresolved.

### Current metrics (mobile) — `/`
| Metric | Value | vs. Previous |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | 61 | **-6 pts (regression)** |
| LCP | 6,544 ms | -932 ms (improved but still critically slow) |
| CLS | 0.015 | stable |
| TBT | 204 ms | **+105 ms (notable increase)** |

### Also regressed — `/projects/screenshot-to-primevue`
| Metric | Value | vs. Previous |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | 82 | **-7 pts (regression, now below 85)** |
| LCP | 3,807 ms | +749 ms |
| TBT | 126 ms | +72 ms |

### Partially recovered — `/projects`
- Performance recovered from 76 → 83, but still below the 85 threshold.

### Still open — `/about`
- `/about` remains an empty placeholder (stub text only, no nav or footer); SEO score **83**, below the 85 threshold — unchanged across multiple audits.

### Suggested fixes for `/` (highest priority)
1. Preload the LCP hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`.
2. Serve the hero in a next-gen format (WebP/AVIF) sized for mobile viewports.
3. Investigate the TBT spike to 204 ms — identify and defer any newly introduced render-blocking scripts.
4. Defer or remove render-blocking stylesheets above the fold.

### Suggested fixes for `/projects/screenshot-to-primevue`
1. Profile what increased LCP by 749 ms — likely a sample thumbnail image not being preloaded or optimised.
2. Check for any new third-party script added to the page.

### Suggested fix for `/about`
- Build out the About page with real content, nav, and footer to resolve the SEO score and placeholder issue.
